creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
the port fails to install
	as the makefile does not find a target.

Fix: 

add a do-install rule 
	like in ports/audio/lame/Makefile,v 1.12


do-install:
        @( cd ${WRKSRC}; ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} lame ${PREFIX}/bin )
        @( cd ${WRKSRC}; ${INSTALL_MAN} doc/man/lame.1 \
         ${PREFIX}/man/man1 )
How-To-Repeat: 
	try to install

===>  Extracting for lame-gtk-3.70
